languages.text: [Атаковать] "Я кара Его, что очистит сей мир от скверны и ереси!"

traits.locale_text: [Атаковать] "Я кара Его, что очистит сей мир от скверны и ереси!"

languages.text: [Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"
languages.original_text: [Атаковать] "Я кара Его, что очистит сей мир от скверны и ереси!"

traits.locale_text: [Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"
[Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"
[Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"

languages.text: [Angriff] "Ich bin Seine Strafe, die diese Welt von Makel und Ketzerei reinigen wird!"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"

languages.text: [Attaque] "Je suis son châtiment qui nettoiera ce monde de la souillure et de l'hérésie !".
languages.original_text: [Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"

languages.text: [攻击]"我是他的惩罚，我将洗净这个世界的污点和异端！"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"

languages.text: [Ataque] "¡Yo soy Su castigo que limpiará este mundo de mancha y herejía!"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"

languages.text: [攻撃]"私はこの世界を汚れと異端から清める主の罰なのだ！"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"

languages.text: [Saldırı] "Ben bu dünyayı kirden ve sapkınlıktan arındıracak olan O'nun cezasıyım!"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "I am His punishment that will cleanse this world of taint and heresy!"
